name: mehr110-functions
description: Backend API (Cloud Functions) for صندوق مهر۱۱۰ — a family ROSCA fund manager. Every interaction goes through a callable; the browser never writes Firestore directly.

scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf lib/assets && cp -R src/assets lib/assets
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth,hosting
